findings.description: Chat input textarea lacks aria-label
findings.evidence: entrypoints/sidepanel/pages/ChatPage.tsx:1441-1455 — ds-chat-input has no aria-label or aria-labelledby
findings.expected: Chat input should have aria-label for screen readers
findings.actual: No accessible label on chat input

findings.description: Send button lacks aria-label
findings.evidence: entrypoints/sidepanel/pages/ChatPage.tsx — ds-chat-send-button has no aria-label
findings.expected: Send button should have aria-label='Send message' or similar
findings.actual: No accessible label on send button

findings.description: Mic button lacks aria-label
findings.evidence: entrypoints/sidepanel/pages/ChatPage.tsx — ds-chat-mic-button has no aria-label
findings.expected: Mic button should have aria-label for voice input
findings.actual: No accessible label on mic button

findings.description: Chat message rows lack aria-label or role
findings.evidence: entrypoints/sidepanel/components/ChatMessage.tsx:15 — ds-chat-message-row has no aria attributes
findings.expected: Message rows should have role='article' or aria-label for screen readers
findings.actual: No accessible semantics on message rows

findings.description: Image attachment cards lack aria-label
findings.evidence: entrypoints/sidepanel/pages/ChatPage.tsx — ds-chat-attachment-card has no aria-label
findings.expected: Attachment cards should have aria-label with file name
findings.actual: No accessible label on attachment cards

findings.description: Attachment remove button lacks aria-label
findings.evidence: entrypoints/sidepanel/pages/ChatPage.tsx — attachment remove button has no aria-label
findings.expected: Remove button should have aria-label='Remove attachment'
findings.actual: No accessible label on remove button

findings.description: Model selector segments lack aria-label
findings.evidence: entrypoints/sidepanel/pages/ChatPage.tsx — ds-chat-segment buttons have no aria-label
findings.expected: Segment buttons should have aria-label for model names
findings.actual: No accessible labels on model selector

findings.description: Effort selector lacks aria-label
findings.evidence: entrypoints/sidepanel/pages/ChatPage.tsx — ds-chat-effort-select has no aria-label
findings.expected: Effort select should have aria-label='Reasoning effort'
findings.actual: No accessible label on effort selector

findings.description: Chat error messages lack retry action
findings.evidence: entrypoints/sidepanel/pages/ChatPage.tsx — ds-chat-error shows error but no retry button
findings.expected: Error messages should include retry action when retryable
findings.actual: Error displayed without actionable retry

findings.description: Browser control error banner lacks detail expansion
findings.evidence: entrypoints/sidepanel/pages/BrowserControlPage.tsx:83 — banner.show('error', message) shows flat string
findings.expected: Error banners should allow expansion for technical details
findings.actual: Flat error string in banner

findings.description: Chat page lacks skeleton loading for initial load
findings.evidence: entrypoints/sidepanel/pages/ChatPage.tsx — no skeleton shown while messages load
findings.expected: Show SkeletonList while chat history loads
findings.actual: Empty state shown until messages arrive

findings.description: Automation page flight recorder lacks loading indicator
findings.evidence: entrypoints/sidepanel/pages/AutomationPage.tsx — flight recorder events load without skeleton
findings.expected: Show loading state while flight recorder data loads
findings.actual: No loading indicator for flight recorder

findings.description: Chat composer drops to single column on narrow screens without graceful degradation
findings.evidence: entrypoints/sidepanel/style.css:1620-1631 — chat-control-row goes single column but buttons may overflow
findings.expected: Chat controls should reflow gracefully on narrow screens
findings.actual: Potential overflow on very narrow sidepanels

findings.description: Usage dashboard heatmap may overflow on narrow screens
findings.evidence: entrypoints/sidepanel/style.css:1847-1851 — usage-heatmap-grid uses auto-fit minmax(12px)
findings.expected: Heatmap should scroll or collapse on narrow screens
findings.actual: May overflow or become too small to tap

findings.description: Chat input Enter key behavior not documented in code
findings.evidence: entrypoints/sidepanel/pages/ChatPage.tsx — keyboard handling for Enter/Shift+Enter not visible in component
findings.expected: Enter sends message, Shift+Enter creates newline (standard chat UX)
findings.actual: Keyboard behavior inferred but not explicitly tested

findings.description: Tab navigation through side tabs may not work with keyboard
findings.evidence: entrypoints/sidepanel/App.tsx:86-107 — side-tab buttons use native button focus but no arrow key navigation
findings.expected: Arrow keys should navigate between tabs when focused
findings.actual: Only Tab key navigation, no arrow key support

findings.description: Some pages use ds-page class, others use custom padding
findings.evidence: Compare ds-page (gap: 12px, padding: 12px) vs pages with custom padding
findings.expected: All pages should use consistent layout primitives
findings.actual: Mixed layout approaches across pages

findings.description: Empty state icons use different styles across pages
findings.evidence: Some pages use ds-empty-state-icon, others use inline SVGs
findings.expected: All empty states should use consistent icon treatment
findings.actual: Inconsistent empty state icon styles

findings.description: Hardcoded English strings in component code
findings.evidence: entrypoints/sidepanel/components/ChatMessage.tsx:73 — '>_' hardcoded, not from i18n
findings.expected: All user-visible strings should use t() for localization
findings.actual: Some strings hardcoded in English

findings.description: Chat message timestamps not localized
findings.evidence: Chat messages may show timestamps without locale formatting
findings.expected: Timestamps should use locale-aware formatting
findings.actual: Timestamp localization unclear

findings.description: Chat input not auto-focused when switching to chat tab
findings.evidence: entrypoints/sidepanel/App.tsx:113 — ChatPage rendered but no focus management
findings.expected: Chat input should auto-focus when chat tab is selected
findings.actual: No auto-focus on chat input

findings.description: Modal dialogs don't trap focus
findings.evidence: entrypoints/sidepanel/components/settings/primitives.tsx — useConfirm modal has aria-modal='true' but no focus trap
findings.expected: Modal should trap focus and return focus on close
findings.actual: Focus may escape modal to background elements

findings.description: Dark mode scrollbar thumb may be too subtle
findings.evidence: entrypoints/sidepanel/style.css:230-237 — scrollbar uses ds-border-hover which is subtle in dark mode
findings.expected: Scrollbar should be visible enough to indicate scrollability
findings.actual: Scrollbars may be invisible in dark mode

findings.description: Chat thinking details may flash open/closed during streaming
findings.evidence: entrypoints/sidepanel/components/ChatMessage.tsx:39 — details open prop toggles during streaming
findings.expected: Thinking section should stay stable during streaming
findings.actual: May flicker between open/closed states

findings.description: Large chat histories may cause performance issues
findings.evidence: entrypoints/sidepanel/pages/ChatPage.tsx — messages rendered without virtualization
findings.expected: Long chat histories should use virtual scrolling or pagination
findings.actual: All messages rendered in DOM
